showcases.title: Bun and Bread Club
showcases.subtitle: A cozy café experience designed from concept to reality

carouselImages.imageAlt: Bun and Bread Club exterior view
Bun and Bread Club interior seating area
Bun and Bread Club menu showcase

features.title: Brand Identity
features.description: Created a warm, inviting brand identity with a cohesive color palette and logo design that reflects the café's values of comfort and community. The design emphasizes the artisanal nature of fresh baked goods.

features.title: Interior Design
features.description: Collaborated on the café's interior layout and aesthetic, ensuring the space promotes a welcoming atmosphere for customers to relax and enjoy their experience.

features.title: Marketing Materials
features.description: Designed comprehensive marketing collateral including business cards, flyers, and social media graphics to launch the café and build initial brand awareness in the local community.

features.title: Social Media Strategy
features.description: Developed and executed a social media marketing strategy to grow the café's online presence and engage with customers through regular posts and community interactions.

stories.title: From Concept to Launch
stories.subtitle: The Journey of Bringing Bun and Bread Club to Life
stories.description: Working on this project was incredibly rewarding as I got to see the café grow from an idea into a thriving business. The owners had a clear vision but needed help translating it into visual designs and marketing strategy.

images.imageAlt: Final design mockups and brand guidelines

stories.footer: This experience taught me the importance of understanding the client's vision and translating it into practical, beautiful design solutions that resonate with their target audience.
